module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared common crate root for reusable config loading, external re-export adapters, database telemetry logging, and structure utilities. It exposes WorkQueue cleanup support used by agent host-disconnect session reset, and lib.rs re-exports serializable config system types Arch, Platform, and System alongside Config, TelemetryConfig, and related models, plus the Logger telemetry client with LogMessage, LogTag, and LoggingError.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Owns the common crate configuration model, config-file discovery, serializable OS/architecture System detection, alias substitution, credential resolution, runtime path normalization, and tool directory settings.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Owns public re-export wrappers for third-party libraries so downstream crates can route third-party access through common where appropriate, including the redb embedded-database wrapper backing telemetry storage.

childModules.name: logging
childModules.purpose: Owns the database telemetry logging system: the serializable LogTag and LogMessage records, the LoggingError enum, and the Logger client that hosts a TCP telemetry server persisting messages to a fresh per-start timestamped local redb database or connects to a remote server over length-prefixed JSON frames.

childModules.name: structure
childModules.purpose: Owns shared structural data interfaces such as WorkQueue, whose clear() method empties working and completed entries for session cleanup, plus channel helpers.
